zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley於1275年1月8日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾可比時，她的父親Eudes la Zouche67歲，母親Millicent de Cantilupe30歲。她於1289年與Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1314年12月5日在英國薩默塞特波特波利享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特波特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley于1275年1月8日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾可比时，她的父亲Eudes la Zouche67岁，母亲Millicent de Cantilupe30岁。她于1289年与Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1314年12月5日在英国薩默塞特波特波利享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特波特波利。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley was born on 8 January 1275, in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Eudes la Zouche, was 67 and her mother, Millicent de Cantilupe, was 30. She married Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley in 1289, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 December 1314, in Portbury, Somerset, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Portbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley est née le 8 janvier 1275, à Corby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Eudes la Zouche, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Millicent de Cantilupe, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley en 1289, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1314, à Portbury, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Portbury, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley am 8. Januar 1275 in Corby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes la Zouche 67 und ihre Mutter Millicent de Cantilupe 30. Sie hat 1289 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1314 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Portbury, Somerset, England und wurde in Portbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley è nata il il 8 gennaio 1275 nel Corby, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Eudes la Zouche, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Millicent de Cantilupe, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley nel 1289, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1314, nel Portbury, Somerset, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Portbury, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeleyが1275年1月8日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルビーで生まれた時，父Eudes la Zoucheは67歳，母Millicent de Cantilupeは30歳であった。1289年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでSir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1314年12月5日にイギリスソメルセトポルトブリーで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトポルトブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley(이)가 1275년 1월 8일 영국 노르섬프토실르 코르비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes la Zouche(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent de Cantilupe(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 12월 5일 영국 서머세트 포트버이에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 포트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.08 January 1275–05 December 1314: 8 de janeiro de 1275–5 de dezembro de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1275, em Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eudes la Zouche, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Millicent de Cantilupe, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley em 1289, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1314, em Portbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Portbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley родилась 8 января 1275 г. в местности корби, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Eudes la Zouche было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent de Cantilupe, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley в 1289 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 5 декабря 1314 г. в местности портбури, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности портбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.08 January 1275–05 December 1314: 8 de enero de 1275–5 de diciembre de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley nació el 8 de enero de 1275, en Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eudes la Zouche, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Millicent de Cantilupe, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley en 1289, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1314, en Portbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Portbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
